issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Posts list with Graphcache mutation update
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses cache.updateQuery in updates.Mutation.createPost and requestPolicy network-only for refresh; baseline knows hooks but misses Graphcache update API and request policies.

scenarios.name: SSR-ready urql Client with auth and subscriptions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment composes exchanges (cacheExchange, fetchExchange, subscriptionExchange) and uses fetchOptions for bearer token plus Provider; baseline omits exchange pipeline and the SSR hydration pattern.
